## Source: ossf-package-analysis (c8feb4336c26b61a10aec616c9f9f8777fcdd99ab55df96c82ca78bd088530b9)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'dependency-graph-platform-proto' @ 99.99.99 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
